hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.symlink'; then echo 'WARNING: This .symlink file is live-symlinked to $HOME. Your edit is already active.' >&2; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.zsh$'; then OUTPUT=$(zsh -n "$FILE" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "SYNTAX ERROR in $FILE:" >&2; echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/bin/'; then OUTPUT=$(shellcheck "$FILE" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "SHELLCHECK ERRORS in $FILE:" >&2; echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'Brewfile$'; then awk '/^(tap|brew|cask|mas) /{type=$1; name=$0; if(type==prev_type && name<prev_name){print "Out of order: " prev_name " before " name > "/dev/stderr"; err=1} prev_type=type; prev_name=name}END{exit (err?1:0)}' "$FILE"; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "BREWFILE ORDERING ERROR" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0
echo 'BLOCKED: git rebase is aliased to interactive mode in this repo. Do not use in automation.' >&2; exit 2
